description:
The FingerPosePreset component is itself a IFingerPoseSourceComponent type component that it's finger pose data is determined by the preset selected in ``PresetPose``.

For more information on finger pose sources, please see Finger Posing System.

fields.PresetPose: The Finger pose data this component's finger pose data should be.

usage: Select a Preset for ``PresetPose``. This component can now be used as a IFingerPoseSourceComponent in other components that mix or use such data.
